description: A partial failure leaves an order paid but never fulfilled, with money taken and nothing shipped.
body: Failure mode: a failure between charging and fulfilment leaves the order paid but never marked shipped, so money is taken while no goods move and no recovery runs. Detection signals: orders sitting in paid past the fulfilment threshold; payments with no matching shipment; support tickets about charged-but-not-received purchases. Do not leave paid-but-unfulfilled orders unreconciled. Safer fallback: run an idempotent reconciliation that drives stuck orders forward to fulfilment or backward to refund-and-restock, gating money moves on business.finance.
